name: Baked Ham with Cumberland Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Remove skin from ham; score the surface with shallow diagonal cuts, making diamond shapes. Mix brown sugar and mustard; rub into fat of ham. Insert a whole clove in center of each diamond.
Place ham in a large roaster with a baking rack. Bake, uncovered at 325°F for 20 - 22 minutes per pound. For sauce, combine all the ingredients in a medium saucepan. Cook over medium heat until thickened, stirring often. Serve over sliced ham.
